creator: jdhore1@gmail.com
text:
qmmp in-tree is currently at 0.8.0. Upstream is at 0.8.3 released 2015-01-05
(0.8.1 released 2014-08-06 and 0.8.2 released 2014-10-13).

Please bump. Link to sources:
http://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/files/qmmp-0.8.3.tar.bz2

It does not appear that there were any changes that would require changing the
makefile apart from the version.

Thanks!
